headline: Baker Hughes Stock Trades At Highest Level Since 2014 After Recent Surge
summary: Shares of oil major Baker Hughes trade at the highest level since August 2014, after having risen sharply recently.  The raised Composite rating puts Baker Hughes in the top 1% of all stocks in terms of key performance metrics and technical strength.

headline: Baker Hughes Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management said overcame significant disruption tied to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, driven by record order activity and margin expansion in its Industrial & Energy Technology (IET) segment. summary: TD Cowen  analyst Marc Bianchi   maintains Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $64 to $75.

headline: Strait Of Hormuz May Stay Shut Until Second Half Of 2026 Amid Middle East, Baker Hughes CFO Says
summary: Baker Hughes Co. is factoring a prolonged Strait of Hormuz closure into its financial guidance, with CFO Ahmed Moghal telling investors Friday the waterway may not fully reopen until the second half of the year. “There’s still a great deal of uncertainty regarding, ultimately, the duration and depth of the conflict,” Moghal said on the company’s first-quarter earnings call.
